title: pilularia globulifera subsp. minuta
intro: Pilularia globulifera subsp. minuta, also known as a dwarf hornwort, is a rare, small aquatic plant species that belongs to the family Pilulariaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues, and is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving symptoms of cystitis, incontinence, and other urinary disorders, as well as soothing the bladder and urinary tract. Pilularia globulifera subsp. minuta is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall urinary health.
